column1: # Gene definition file for Gorilla gorilla (GorGor)
#           Pseudogenes were added to prevent NaN from AmpliCoNE-build
#   RBMY  — 13 copies (including pseudogene substitution LOC129520271 region)
#           Note: LOC129520271 not listed here; RBMY entries cover equivalent coords
#   CONTROL — 9 regions spanning single-copy portions of chrY
#             (coordinates derived from single-copy gene loci: DDX3Y, KDM5D,
#              USP9Y, UTY, ZFY, TBL1Y, and intergenic single-copy windows)
# VCY is absent in gorilla (not included).
